title: Fast client HUD
description: FastClient HUD enhances Minecraft with customizable HUD elements, performance stats, visual improvements, and utility features for a better gameplay experience.
body:
**FastClient HUD** is a modern, highly customizable Minecraft client-side HUD mod designed to enhance gameplay visibility, performance monitoring, and the player experience. The mod provides a collection of draggable HUD elements, visual enhancements, utility features, and quality-of-life improvements through an intuitive ClickGUI and HUD Editor. **_This HUD will pop up after pressing the right-shift key._**

Players can monitor real-time information such as FPS, Ping, CPS, Memory Usage, Coordinates, Speed, Direction, Clock, Server Information, Armor Status, Active Potions, and more. The built-in HUD editor allows complete customization of module positions and appearance to create a personalized interface.

FastClient HUD also includes visual enhancement modules such as Custom Crosshair, Motion Blur, FullBright, Hitbox Display, Damage Indicators, Block Overlay, Particle Controls, Time Changer, and Scoreboard customization. Utility features such as AutoGG, AutoText, Toggle Sneak, Zoom, Notifications, and Tool Warnings help streamline gameplay and enhance convenience.

Built for the Fabric modding platform, FastClient HUD prioritizes performance, flexibility, and a clean user experience, making it suitable for PvP players, survival enthusiasts, and competitive Minecraft players alike. All the credits go to Fast Client Community. To download Fast Client Launcher, visit the official website. Link: https://fastclient.net/

**✨ Features**
- FPS Counter
- Ping Display
- CPS Counter
- Keystrokes
- Coordinates HUD
- Speed HUD
- Clock & Day Counter
- Armor HUD
- Potion Effects HUD
- Server Info HUD
- Custom Crosshair
- Motion Blur
- FullBright
- Damage Indicator
- Hitbox Viewer
- Zoom
- AutoGG
- Toggle Sneak
- Notifications System
- Draggable HUD Editor
- Modern ClickGUI Interface

**🧩 Compatibility**

✅ Minecraft 26.1 - 26.1.1 - 26.1.2

✅ Fabric Loader

✅ Client-side only

✅ Compatible with other HUD/utility mods
